name: Service Loans
description_short: Service Loan offers personal loans up to $50K in the Austin, TX area for bills, vacations, and other expenses. They accept applicants with bad credit and provide same-day qualification.
description_long:
Service Loan is a personal loan provider operating in Austin, Texas, under the parent company Loans of Texas (operating entities: Phoenix Financial Holdings, Inc. and Loan South Finance Corp, NMLS# 2029924 and 2031643). The company maintains a physical branch at 2121 East Oltorf, Suite 12-A in South Austin, serving the greater Austin metropolitan area and surrounding cities including Kyle, Buda, Round Rock, Georgetown, and Pflugerville.

Service Loan specializes in personal loans for general-purpose needs including bill consolidation, vacations, holiday gifts, and emergency expenses. They advertise willingness to work with borrowers who have bad credit, positioning themselves as an accessible lending option. Applications can be submitted online or in-person at their Austin location. The company claims applicants can qualify within minutes of applying and receive loans tailored to their financial situation. They require proof of residence and income documentation for qualification.

The company distinguishes itself through local community presence and accessibility features, including wheelchair-accessible parking and entrance at their East Oltorf location. They operate weekdays 8:30 AM–5:30 PM and emphasize commitment to helping residents "break free of the endless cycle of debt." Their service area spans multiple surrounding cities, suggesting regional expansion efforts beyond their single advertised Austin location.

Limitations include minimal transparency on their website regarding loan terms, APR rates, fees, or repayment structures. No specific loan amounts, interest rates, or eligibility requirements are disclosed. The company's "about" page returns a 404 error, limiting available background information. Online presence appears basic with limited customer reviews visible. Borrowers seeking detailed loan comparison information would need to contact the company directly.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Accepts applicants with bad credit, removing a common barrier to qualification
Fast qualification timeline (claims "within minutes" of applying)
Flexible loan purposes (bills, vacations, gifts, general expenses)
Multiple application channels (online or in-person at South Austin branch)
Wheelchair-accessible location with accessible parking and entrance
Extended service area covering 20+ surrounding cities and suburbs beyond Austin
In-person support available during business hours with documented phone line (512-462-0660)
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
No loan amount ranges, terms, or repayment schedule details provided
Limited online presence with broken 'About' page and minimal customer reviews
Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside South Austin area
No transparent eligibility criteria or credit score requirements specified
Minimal information about parent companies or regulatory oversight despite NMLS licensing
best_for: Austin-area residents with bad credit seeking personal loans for general purposes
Borrowers who prefer in-person application and support at a physical branch location
People living in suburban Austin communities (Kyle, Buda, Round Rock, Georgetown) within their service radius
diagnosis: Service Loan is best for Austin-area residents with imperfect credit who value in-person service and quick decisions. The critical caveat is complete lack of rate, fee, and term transparency on their website—borrowers must contact them directly to compare actual costs against alternatives.
services: In-person loan applications at South Austin branch
Branch location services in South Austin (East Oltorf)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2121 E Oltorf St Suite 12-a, Austin, TX 78741
